creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text: I think stable/13 is supposed to pick up fixes off of the openzfs 2.1.3 branch.  The aforementioned commit isn't present there, so I suppose we should merge it upstream.  I think we could simply cherry-pick it straight to stable/13 and releng/13.1 in the meantime.  Allan, Martin, is there any reason not to do this?
